name: echoforest-workspace
description: Workspace helper scripts for EchoForest backend, frontend, simulator, and firmware modules.

scripts.firmware:test: cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Ifirmware_modules/common -Ifirmware_modules/c5 -Ifirmware_modules/s3 firmware_modules/common/cloud_client.c firmware_modules/common/echoforest_protocol.c firmware_modules/common/mock_cloud_transport.c firmware_modules/c5/c5_app.c firmware_modules/c5/control_screen_renderer.c firmware_modules/c5/speaker_events.c firmware_modules/c5/touch_actions.c firmware_modules/c5/c5_bitmap_text_renderer.c firmware_modules/s3/s3_app.c firmware_modules/s3/main_screen_renderer.c firmware_modules/s3/sensor_mock.c firmware_modules/s3/sensor_real_adapter.c firmware_modules/test/firmware_business_logic_test.c -o /tmp/echoforest_firmware_test && /tmp/echoforest_firmware_test
